name: jarvis-desktop
description: JARVIS AI Voice Assistant — Commercial desktop app with local AI, voice control, and licensing
author: JARVIS

scripts.build:ui: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'),{cpSync,rmSync}=require('fs');rmSync('renderer',{recursive:true,force:true});execSync('pnpm --filter @workspace/jarvis-ui run build',{cwd:'..',stdio:'inherit',env:{...process.env,BASE_PATH:'./'}});cpSync('../artifacts/jarvis-ui/dist/public','renderer',{recursive:true});console.log('[Build] UI copied to renderer/ OK')"
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: npm run build:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.json && electron-builder --linux
